item.dc:creator: Kyla Guilfoil
Dareh Gregorian
item.description: A federal judge ruled that President Donald Trump’s handpicked board at the Kennedy Center did not have the authority to rename the venue.

media:content.media:text: Kennedy Center Lawyers Direct Staff To Remove Trump's Name.
media:content.media:description: Construction crews build scaffolding outside The Kennedy Center in Washington on Saturday.

item.title: Kennedy Center official tells judge Trump’s name has been removed from building and website

item.description: Folarin Balogun's pair of goals led Team USA to a 4-1 win against Paraguay in their World Cup opener at SoFi Stadium in Los Angeles. Morgan Chesky reports on Team USA's performance and their next match against Australia on June 18 in Seattle.

media:content.media:title: Team USA kicks off World Cup with win over Paraguay
media:content.media:description: Folarin Balogun's pair of goals led Team USA to a 4-1 win against Paraguay in their World Cup opener at SoFi Stadium in Los Angeles. Morgan Chesky reports on Team USA's performance and their next match against Australia on June 18 in Seattle.

item.title: Team USA kicks off World Cup with win over Paraguay

item.dc:creator: Andrew Greif
item.description: Pochettino, a 54-year-old Argentine, has been on the job for 20 months, but Friday’s game was unquestionably his biggest opportunity to make an impression on a wider fanbase tuning in to watch the U.S. for the first time.

media:content.media:text: USA v Paraguay: Group D - FIFA World Cup 2026
media:content.media:description: Mauricio Pochettino, head coach of the U.S. men, speaks to the media after the team's victory Friday.

item.title: Coaching the U.S. was a big test for Mauricio Pochettino. Then his World Cup opener went ‘amazing.’

item.description: As the World Cup gets underway, Tom Llamas speaks with a man who has been part of the World Cup experience for decades, and whose voice people are sure to recognize. This week’s great American is Andrés Cantor.

media:content.media:title: Great Americans: A conversation with Andrés Cantor
media:content.media:description: As the World Cup gets underway, Tom Llamas speaks with a man who has been part of the World Cup experience for decades, and whose voice people are sure to recognize. This week’s great American is Andrés Cantor.

item.title: Great Americans: A conversation with Andrés Cantor

item.description: Imágenes desde San Francisco, donde Suiza se enfrenta a Qatar durante su primer partido del Mundial 2026.

media:content.media:title: ¡La afición qatarí está presente y alentando a su selección!
media:content.media:description: Imágenes desde San Francisco, donde Suiza se enfrenta a Qatar durante su primer partido del Mundial 2026.

item.title: ¡La afición qatarí está presente y alentando a su selección!

item.description: Los suizos y qataríes, están ajustando las últimas piezas para el inicio de su primer encuentro en la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026; Suiza parte como favorita, mientras que la Selección de Qatar quiere demostrar de lo que son capaces de hacer.

media:content.media:title: La mesa está servida para el arranque suizo en el Mundial
media:content.media:description: Los suizos y qataríes, están ajustando las últimas piezas para el inicio de su primer encuentro en la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026; Suiza parte como favorita, mientras que la Selección de Qatar quiere demostrar de lo que son capaces de hacer.

item.title: La mesa está servida para el arranque suizo en el Mundial

item.description: El excapitán y campeón del mundo con Brasil reconoce que la Canarinha llega al Mundial con más dudas que certezas sobre su alineación y sistema de juego, pero insiste en que el talento de sus futbolistas la mantiene entre las grandes favoritas al título.

media:content.media:title: Dunga: “Brasil siempre parte como favorito” | Vive el Mundial
media:content.media:description: El excapitán y campeón del mundo con Brasil reconoce que la Canarinha llega al Mundial con más dudas que certezas sobre su alineación y sistema de juego, pero insiste en que el talento de sus futbolistas la mantiene entre las grandes favoritas al título.

item.title: Dunga: “Brasil siempre parte como favorito” | Vive el Mundial

item.description: El entrenador de Qatar afirma que buscará un juego balanceado en su debut ante Suiza; además de considerarse preparado para el reto.

media:content.media:title: "Estoy listo para enfrentar este gran reto": Julen Lopetegui
media:content.media:description: El entrenador de Qatar afirma que buscará un juego balanceado en su debut ante Suiza; además de considerarse preparado para el reto.

item.title: "Estoy listo para enfrentar este gran reto": Julen Lopetegui

item.description: Tom Cruise, Brad Pitt, Leonardo DiCaprio, Katy Perry, Sofía Vergara, Bill Gates y otras figuras internacionales dijeron presente en el SoFi Stadium durante el debut de Estados Unidos en la Copa del Mundo.

media:content.media:title: Hollywood se rinde al Mundial: desfile de estrellas en Los Ángeles
media:content.media:description: Tom Cruise, Brad Pitt, Leonardo DiCaprio, Katy Perry, Sofía Vergara, Bill Gates y otras figuras internacionales dijeron presente en el SoFi Stadium durante el debut de Estados Unidos en la Copa del Mundo.

item.title: Hollywood se rinde al Mundial: desfile de estrellas en Los Ángeles

item.description: Ya está llegando la Selección de Suiza y los aficionados que vienen a alentar a los helvéticos, que inician su paso mundialista ante Qatar, partiendo como favoritos.

media:content.media:title: Suiza se hace presente y pone a vibrar la Copa Mundial en Santa Clara
media:content.media:description: Ya está llegando la Selección de Suiza y los aficionados que vienen a alentar a los helvéticos, que inician su paso mundialista ante Qatar, partiendo como favoritos.

item.title: Suiza se hace presente y pone a vibrar la Copa Mundial en Santa Clara

item.description: El exjugador chileno Iván ‘Bam Bam’ Zamorano analizó el debut de la selección de Estados Unidos, destacando el despliegue que tuvo el equipo ante Paraguay y la fortaleza táctica y mental para afrontar la Copa del Mundo.

media:content.media:title: Iván Zamorano: “Pochettino dio una clase catedral de táctica” | Hoy en el Mundial
media:content.media:description: El exjugador chileno Iván ‘Bam Bam’ Zamorano analizó el debut de la selección de Estados Unidos, destacando el despliegue que tuvo el equipo ante Paraguay y la fortaleza táctica y mental para afrontar la Copa del Mundo.

item.title: Iván Zamorano: “Pochettino dio una clase catedral de táctica” | Hoy en el Mundial

item.description: Los jugadores del USMNT no ocultaron su felicidad tras la gran exhibición que dieron en su debut en la justa mundialista y ante un equipo poderoso como del de Paraguay.

media:content.media:title: Hablan Pepi, Alonso y Balogun, tras la goleada de Estados Unidos a Paraguay
media:content.media:description: Los jugadores del USMNT no ocultaron su felicidad tras la gran exhibición que dieron en su debut en la justa mundialista y ante un equipo poderoso como del de Paraguay.

item.title: Hablan Pepi, Alonso y Balogun, tras la goleada de Estados Unidos a Paraguay

item.description: El debut de la selección de las barras y las estrellas fue soñado y engalanada con coloridos y apasionados aficionados.

media:content.media:title: Estados Unidos contó con verdaderas celebridades en las gradas como Tom Cruise y David Beckham
media:content.media:description: El debut de la selección de las barras y las estrellas fue soñado y engalanada con coloridos y apasionados aficionados.

item.title: Estados Unidos contó con verdaderas celebridades en las gradas como Tom Cruise y David Beckham

item.description: Nuestros expertos desmenuzan la gran actuación del equipo de Mauricio Pochettino y la decepcionante actuación de Paraguay.

media:content.media:title: Una noche mágica de Estados Unidos: El análisis de la goleada sobre Paraguay
media:content.media:description: Nuestros expertos desmenuzan la gran actuación del equipo de Mauricio Pochettino y la decepcionante actuación de Paraguay.

item.title: Una noche mágica de Estados Unidos: El análisis de la goleada sobre Paraguay

item.description: President Donald Trump said in a post on Truth Social that the U.S. and Iran will sign a deal on June 14 that is expected to reopen the Strait of Hormuz. NBC News’ Julie Tsirkin reports on how the agreement addresses the future of Iran’s nuclear weapons program.

media:content.media:title: Trump says deal with Iran is expected to be signed on Sunday
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump said in a post on Truth Social that the U.S. and Iran will sign a deal on June 14 that is expected to reopen the Strait of Hormuz. NBC News’ Julie Tsirkin reports on how the agreement addresses the future of Iran’s nuclear weapons program.

item.title: Trump says deal with Iran is expected to be signed on Sunday

item.dc:creator: Mirna Alsharif
Madison Lambert
item.description: Cleveland Cavaliers shooting guard James Harden was arrested in Harris County, Texas, early Saturday morning and charged with misdemeanor unlawful carrying of weapons, according to court documents

media:content.media:description: Cavaliers guard James Harden in Cleveland on May 23.

item.title: NBA star James Harden arrested in Texas on weapons charge

item.dc:creator: Jeremy Mikula
Ashley Mowreader
item.description: Taylor Swift teams up, Pope Leo XIV visits the world’s tallest church, and the World Cup kicks off in North America.
item.title: Anti-immigration riots hit a European capital, and an epic NBA comeback: The news quiz

item.description: When SpaceX stock began trading on the NASDAQ, company founder Elon Musk became the world’s first trillionaire. Many of his current and former employees also now find themselves to be multi-millionaires. NBC News’ Christine Romans reports.

media:content.media:title: SpaceX makes history in largest ever initial public offering
media:content.media:description: When SpaceX stock began trading on the NASDAQ, company founder Elon Musk became the world’s first trillionaire. Many of his current and former employees also now find themselves to be multi-millionaires. NBC News’ Christine Romans reports.

item.title: SpaceX makes history in largest ever initial public offering

item.description: President Donald Trump called off strikes on Iran, saying a deal to end the war and reopen the Strait of Hormuz, a key trade route, would soon be “finalized.” NBC News' Richard Engel reports from Jerusalem on what could happen next and what Tehran is saying.

media:content.media:title: When could an Iran peace deal be finalized?
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump called off strikes on Iran, saying a deal to end the war and reopen the Strait of Hormuz, a key trade route, would soon be “finalized.” NBC News' Richard Engel reports from Jerusalem on what could happen next and what Tehran is saying.

item.title: When could an Iran peace deal be finalized?

item.dc:creator: The Associated Press
item.description: Armed men in Haiti have kidnapped James Boyard, cabinet director of the Defense Ministry and a highly respected security expert who also serves as inspector general of Haiti’s police, a person with the knowledge of the situation said Saturday

media:content.media:description: Daily life in Port-au-Prince, Haiti, on Feb. 27, 2025.

item.title: Armed men in Haiti’s capital seize a top security official in rare high-level abduction

item.dc:creator: Matt Lavietes
item.description: Tyra Banks filed a defamation lawsuit against Netflix on Saturday, accusing the streaming giant of manipulating her into participating in a bombshell documentary about her former reality show “America’s Next Top Model.”Netflix’s “Reality Check: Inside America’s Next Top Model” chronicles both the show’s historic successes and its controversies, including an early contestant claiming she was sexually assaulted on camera, another undergoing cosmetic surgery to remain in the competi

media:content.media:description: Tyra Banks in Sydney in 2025.

item.title: Tyra Banks sues Netflix over ‘America’s Next Top Model’ doc

item.dc:creator: The Associated Press
item.description: Thousands of demonstrators gathered in Belfast on Saturday to denounce anti-immigrant rioters who set fire to homes and cars earlier in the week after a brutal stabbing blamed on an asylum seeker

media:content.media:description: People gather for anti-racism rally in Belfast, Northern Ireland on June 13.

item.title: Thousands rally in Belfast to condemn anti-immigrant rioting that followed stabbing

item.dc:creator: Francie Ebert
Christine Rapp
item.description: The official start to summer may be days away, but much of the country is already experiencing peak-season heat as a dangerous combination of extreme temperatures, severe thunderstorms and flash flooding threatens tens of millions of people this weekend

media:content.media:text: 'Code Red' advisory is active in New York City
media:content.media:description: A woman walks with an umbrella in New York City this week amid a "code red" warning due to extreme heat.

item.title: Summer hasn’t officially begun, but record-breaking heat is already sweeping parts of the country

item.dc:creator: Mirna Alsharif
Madison Lambert
item.description: Cleveland Cavaliers shooting guard James Harden was arrested in Harris County, Texas, early Saturday morning and charged with misdemeanor unlawful carrying of weapons, according to court documents

media:content.media:description: Cavaliers guard James Harden in Cleveland on May 23.

item.title: NBA star James Harden arrested in Texas on weapons charge

item.dc:creator: Kyla Guilfoil
Dareh Gregorian
item.description: A federal judge ruled that President Donald Trump’s handpicked board at the Kennedy Center did not have the authority to rename the venue.

media:content.media:text: Kennedy Center Lawyers Direct Staff To Remove Trump's Name.
media:content.media:description: Construction crews build scaffolding outside The Kennedy Center in Washington on Saturday.

item.title: Kennedy Center official tells judge Trump’s name has been removed from building and website
